title: -13. 1v4[ ... words ]
content:

(Looks like there’s only one of them…)

The Ibun continued walking with a stupid, vacant expression on its face. It seemed to be in sage mode.

In that case, she figured she could just avoid stimulating it and slip past. Lisa let out a small sigh of relief—right when someone suddenly grabbed her from behind and hugged her tightly.

Startled by the sudden embrace, she let out a short scream. When she turned around, an Ibun was standing there.

Its two long arms were wrapped around her body, circling her slender waist completely. She was fully restrained. Unless she cut off its arms or somehow slipped free, she was going to be assaulted like this.

But because the Ibun was hugging both of her arms along with her torso, Lisa couldn’t even draw her sword.

She reached into the pouch at her waist and pulled out an explosive, wriggling her restrained arms in an attempt to break free, when another Ibun appeared from the front.

(Another one!? But this one…)

Lisa glanced at the penis of the Ibun in front of her. Its shape was unmistakably the same as the one she had seen earlier.

It had probably been drawn over by the scream she had accidentally let out. However, this one was clearly still in sage mode. She thought that if she could somehow deal with the one hugging her from behind, she might still be able to escape. She looked away from the Ibun in front and tried to reach for her pouch again—when she noticed the penis of the one in front beginning to rise and harden.

The next instant, the Ibun’s strange cry echoed throughout the forest.

Birds flew out from the surrounding trees, and the sound of something running could be heard nearby.

(This is bad! I have to get away quickly!)

Even her animal instincts were screaming danger.

She twisted her body and tried moving up and down, but she could barely move at all. The Ibun’s grip was rock solid.

(What the hell is with this strength…!?)

Although Ibuns had almost no combat ability, their bodies were similar to humans, and their snake-like arms could exert muscle power from every joint. Because they lacked normal human joints, they were able to hold her perfectly tight with no gaps.

While she was struggling, yet another Ibun appeared.

From behind, she could hear the footsteps of what sounded like even more Ibuns approaching.

There were currently four, but there could easily be more.

No matter what, she needed to escape immediately, but the Ibun in front of her was about to crush that hope.

The Ibun in front used both hands skillfully to grab Lisa’s thighs and slowly lifted her up into the air. Then it gradually spread her legs apart.

Because she was wearing a short skirt, her blue panties were immediately exposed.

She felt shame, but her opponent was a monster. Right now, escaping took priority over everything else. Even while her legs were being spread, she desperately tried to pull an explosive from the pouch at her waist.

She managed to grab one explosive with her left hand and threw it downward. A loud explosion rang out along with a cloud of smoke.

Her vision and hearing were momentarily dulled, but Lisa noticed that the sensation of the arms restraining her torso had disappeared.

Thinking she could finally escape, she tried to run, but her lower body—her legs—wouldn’t move at all.

Because she had used only a small amount of explosive, the smoke cleared quickly. When she looked down at her legs, the Ibun that had been gripping her thighs was still digging its fingers deep into her flesh.

As she tried to process the situation and think of her next move, her right arm was suddenly grabbed from behind.

She tried to shake it off instinctively, but of course she couldn’t. Her body was forcefully turned around, and her left arm was also seized. Both arms were pulled behind her back and restrained once again.

“What do I do… what do I do…?”

She desperately tried to figure out her next move.

In front of her were Ibun A, slowly spreading her legs into an M-shape using both hands, and Ibun B, slowly approaching. Ibun C was lying on the ground nearby, and Ibun D was the one currently holding both her arms behind her back.

For now, there didn’t seem to be any more Ibuns.

Since some time had passed since Ibun B’s cry and no others had arrived yet, it was probably safe to assume there weren’t any more nearby. But the immediate situation was far worse.

Ibun C, which hadn’t taken the explosive directly, was slowly starting to stand up again, and Ibun B had already moved right behind Ibun A.

She wanted to reach into her waist pouch, but Ibun D was gripping her arms tightly and pulling them backward, making it impossible.

In other words, Lisa had already lost all means of escape.

Still, even when cornered, the human instinct to resist remained.

Lisa struggled desperately to move her body, but she couldn’t break free from the Ibuns’ restraint.

The two Ibuns in front exchanged signals. One of them took over restraining the leg that had been holding her in the M-position.

After confirming that another Ibun had grabbed her thighs with its large hands, the one that had been gripping both thighs released its right hand.

Communication between the Ibuns was also happening behind her.

Suddenly, the weight on Lisa’s chest disappeared, followed by the loud clattering sound of metal hitting the ground.

Without even needing to look, Lisa realized that her chest armor had been removed.

Her beautiful breasts, previously covered by metal armor, were now fully exposed. Her firm, upward-curving rocket-shaped breasts were on full display.

The Ibuns let out happy voices upon seeing Lisa’s chest.

She hadn’t been wearing any underwear beneath her armor. Instead, she wore a tight, form-fitting shirt-like garment.

It was a relatively new product that eliminated unnecessary space, allowing for better lightness and freedom of movement. Lisa had recently started using it regularly.

The problem was its extreme tightness.

Designed to cling perfectly to the shape of the human body, the shirt beautifully accentuated the shape of her breasts and even clearly outlined her nipples.

She had thought it would be fine as long as she wore armor over it, but now that only the thin shirt remained, a strong wave of embarrassment washed over her.

The Ibuns, completely unaware of Lisa’s feelings, began to openly release their desires.
